description: rag-plugin hooks. (1) PreToolUse Bash guardrail that warns before commands that would fight the Qdrant single-process file lock while the ragtools service is up — asks, never denies, only when both the command pattern matches and /health is reachable. (2) UserPromptSubmit retrieval-reminder (v0.3.0, D-017) that injects a system reminder when the user's prompt has a likely match in the indexed knowledge base, so Claude reaches for search_knowledge_base before saying 'I don't have information'. Neither hook blocks or denies.
